about.title: О системе
about.description: Этот портал разработан в рамках проекта по интернет-технологиям. Он объединяет структуру frontend, валидацию на клиенте и модульную архитектуру.
about.frontendDesc: Семантическая разметка HTML5, стили CSS и адаптивный дизайн.
about.clientLogicDesc: Валидация и управление UI на базе JavaScript.
about.scalabilityDesc: Архитектура подготовлена для интеграции backend и базы данных.

gradingPage.note: Final grade composition is always described in the course sheet and may include midterms, assignments, labs, and exam work.

events.title: IT Career Fair 2026
events.description: Large-scale recruitment fair focused on software, cybersecurity, AI, and cloud roles.

events.title: Startup Pitch Night
events.description: Networking event with founders, startup teams, and student innovation projects.

events.title: Engineering Recruiting Day
events.description: Focused on robotics, embedded systems, IoT, and industrial technology profiles.

internshipConsultationPage.title: Internship Consultation
internshipConsultationPage.description: Learn how to register your professional internship for academic credit and fulfill study plan requirements.
process: Find a company offering an internship in a relevant field.
Submit a request to the internship coordinator before the start date.
Sign the internship agreement with the company and university.
Complete the internship and collect supervisor evaluation.
Submit the internship report and defend it if required.
requirements: Minimum 3 calendar months or equivalent workload
The internship must match your study programme area
Company supervisor and university coordinator must be assigned
Prior academic debts should be cleared before registration

approvalPage.title: Documents for Approval
approvalPage.description: Monitor documents that require faculty or university approval, including internship agreements and study plan changes.

items.title: Internship agreement
items.description: Submitted to the faculty coordinator with employer signatures attached.

items.title: Individual study plan request
items.description: Requested due to overlapping internship schedule.

feesPage.title: Fees for Studies
feesPage.notice: You are on a state-funded study place. No tuition fee is required this semester. Maintain the required academic standing to keep funding.
feesPage.paymentNote: Payments are accepted by bank transfer or the university online payment portal. Contact finance@vilniustech.lt for arrangements.

reportSlipPage.title: Final Report Slip
reportSlipPage.description: Track the units that must confirm you have no outstanding obligations before graduation or withdrawal.
reportSlipPage.note: Your final slip can be exported only after all units are marked as cleared.

ethicsPage.title: Academic Ethics
ethicsPage.description: Students are expected to uphold academic integrity and comply with the university ethics code.
ethicsPage.reportDescription: Contact ethics@vilniustech.lt or use the anonymous reporting form. All reports are handled confidentially.

examSessionPage.title: Exam Session
examSessionPage.registrationDescription: Register through this portal no later than 3 days before the exam date.
rules: Phones must be turned off and stored away

formatting: Reference list according to faculty rules

timetablePage.note: Academic year schedules may differ for part-time or evening programmes.

auditoriumPage.description: Real-time room availability for the day. Green means free, amber means occupied soon, and red means occupied.
